title: Structure Editor (Project)
text: Structure Editor (Project) Use the Structure Editor of a project to create new main development objects, and add existing objects to a project so that the can be managed and built together. The Structure Editor displays lists references to main development objects. A project can also contain other projects. You can add and open main development objects, and delete object references. Note: Deleting an object reference does not delete the development object from the Repository.
